narrative: Price data is unavailable today — the CoinGecko, Binance, CryptoCompare, and Kraken APIs all returned 403 from this cloud environment, indicating outbound access to financial data endpoints is blocked by the network policy. News data is also unavailable: no finished coindesk_com spider jobs were found in Scrapy Cloud project 864818, so there are no headlines to summarize. The watchlist covers bitcoin, ethereum, and solana; all three are being tracked but no movement can be reported.
worth_watching: Verify the cloud environment's network policy allows outbound HTTPS to coingecko.com, binance.com, and cryptocompare.com — all returned 403 today
Run the coindesk_com Scrapy Cloud spider manually (project 864818) to confirm it completes and produces finished jobs before the next routine
Consider adding a fallback price source (e.g. CoinGecko Demo API key or a self-hosted price cache) to avoid silent failures
